title: AL 전략: 메인 포인트 하나를 크게 만들기 + Q&A
summary: level / mark / grade / score — 모두 같은 뜻으로 혼용 가능. '점수 뭐 받았어?' = What level/mark/grade/score did you get?
유명인 언급 금지 — 채점자가 나보다 훨씬 많이 알 수 있고, 내가 조금만 틀려도 크게 감점. 모르는 사람 이야기하는 게 안전
이해 못 한 질문은 스킵 가능 — 콤보셋 3문제 전체를 스킵하고도 IH 받은 학생 있음
시제 규칙: 질문이 과거 경험을 묻는다면 과거 시제로, 현재 묘사를 묻는다면 현재 시제로
핵심 전략 (AL 시범): 메인 포인트 하나만 잡고 그것을 계속 '크게' 만들어라 — 다른 랜덤한 포인트 추가 X
스크립트는 길을 보여줄 수 있지만 결국 우리가 직접 걸어야 한다 — 스크립트 의존에서 벗어나야 진짜 실력 향상
Simile(비유)는 묘사(description) 질문에만 써라 — 행동 기반 질문(재활용 방법 등)에는 부자연스럽다

keyExpressions.en: kill two birds with one stone
keyExpressions.ko: 일석이조 / 한 번에 두 가지를 해결하다

keyExpressions.note: 미리 계획하지 않은 여행 묘사에 활용

keyExpressions.en: as soon as we set foot on its soil

keyExpressions.note: literally = 말 그대로, 강조에 매우 유용

keyExpressions.en: the air itself was just so crisp
keyExpressions.note: 추운 날씨의 긍정적 면을 자연스럽게 추가하는 표현
cold(추운) → cold-hearted(냉정한) — 단어 유희(word play)로 답변에 깊이 추가

keyExpressions.en: they even held doors for us
we were not accustomed to that
overall, even though this trip was so cold, the people made it so warm
keyExpressions.ko: 전반적으로, 여행이 너무 추웠지만 사람들이 따뜻하게 만들어줬다
keyExpressions.note: 'Overall, even though...' 결론 패턴 + 메인 포인트 되감기

keyExpressions.en: A script can show you the road, but we have to ultimately walk on it
keyExpressions.ko: 스크립트는 길을 보여줄 수 있지만 결국 우리가 직접 걸어야 한다
keyExpressions.note: 스크립트 의존 경고 — 표현 자체도 멋진 문장
OPIC 핵심 전략 — 새 포인트 추가가 아니라 하나를 깊이 파기

cards.front: 일석이조 / 한 번에 두 가지를 해결하다
cards.back: kill two birds with one stone
cards.example: I want to kill two birds with one stone by studying English and preparing for OPIC at the same time.
My wife and I decided to go on a spontaneous trip to Canada.

cards.front: 그 땅에 발을 딛자마자 (도착 순간 묘사)
cards.back: as soon as we set foot on its soil
cards.example: As soon as we set foot on its soil, we could feel how cold it was.
The moment we stepped outside, it felt like a freezer.
There was snow literally everywhere — on the streets, the cars, the trees.

cards.back: The air itself was just so crisp.
cards.example: Even though it was freezing, the air itself was just so crisp and fresh.
Even though the city was cold, the people were definitely not cold-hearted.

cards.back: They even held doors for us.
cards.example: They were so kind — they even held doors for us, which we weren't used to.

cards.back: We were not accustomed to that.
cards.example: They held doors for us, and that was something we were not accustomed to.

cards.back: Overall, even though it was so [cold], the [people] made it so [warm].
cards.example: Overall, even though this trip was so cold, the people there made it so warm.

cards.front: 메인 포인트를 더 크게 만들다 (새 포인트 추가 X)
cards.example: Don't add random points. Just practice making that one main point bigger.

cards.front: 스크립트는 길을 보여주지만 결국 우리가 걸어야 한다
cards.back: A script can show you the road, but we have to ultimately walk on it.
cards.example: A script can show you the road, but we have to ultimately walk on it ourselves.
